query:
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone,
  u.roles as userRoles,
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.name as partnerName
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%许博睿%' OR u.phone LIKE '%17370026%' OR p.name LIKE '%许博睿%' OR p.phone LIKE '%17370026%'
ORDER BY u.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
